title: Prose origin badge component with origin-specific styling and tooltips
purpose: Renders a styled badge element that displays the origin type of prose content with appropriate labels, tooltips, and CSS classes based on the origin value.
module_context: Exports a ProseOrigin type and a ProseOriginBadge component that maps origin values to labels, tooltips, and CSS class names for display.

steps.content: Determine the CSS class name for the badge based on the origin value.
Set the tooltip text for the badge using the origin-specific tooltip.
Render a span element with the appropriate class name, tooltip, and origin data attribute.
Display the origin label inside the span element.
IF the showExplanation flag is true, append an explanation tooltip to the badge.
